result:
The cleaned dataset has been successfully created and saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv. The file contains 14,105 observations with the following variables:
- NSID: cohort member identifier
- imd15: Area deprivation score at age 15 (from wave_two_lsype_family_background_2020.tab)
- imd16: Area deprivation score at age 16 (from wave_three_lsype_family_background_2020.tab)
- imd32: Area deprivation score at age 32 (from ns9_2022_derived_variables.tab)

All missing value codes have been harmonised according to the standard scheme:
- -9 = Refusal
- -8 = Don't know / insufficient information (recode from -94)
- -3 = Not asked at the fieldwork stage / not interviewed (recode from NA)
- -2 = Script error / information lost
- -1 = Not applicable

The variables are stored as labelled numeric variables with appropriate value labels for the missing codes.
